MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Schmidt for and with Rhonda Donaldson (Petitioner).
Gilbert Jay for Buelah Jenkins (Respondent).

Mr. Jay stated that the parties have talked, and that it is appropriate to set the matter out for discovery, dispute resolution and an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Schmidt stated that they are agreeable to private mediation. The Petition to Determine Ownership to Property, etc. is continued to July 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery, mediation and trial preparation. If the matter is not resolved, a joint status conference statement is to be filed one week prior to the hearing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
